title: Minimum Number of Vertices to Reach All Nodes
titleCn: 可以到达所有点的最少点数目

testcases.input: n = 6, edges = [[0,1],[0,2],[2,5],[3,4],[4,2]] Output: [0,3] Explanation: It's not possible to reach all the nodes from a single vertex. From 0 we can reach [0,1,2,5]. From 3 we can reach [3,4,2,5]. So we output [0,3].
testcases.expectedOutput: [0,3] Explanation: It's not possible to reach all the nodes from a single vertex. From 0 we can reach [0,1,2,5]. From 3 we can reach [3,4,2,5]. So we output [0,3].

testcases.input: n = 5, edges = [[0,1],[2,1],[3,1],[1,4],[2,4]] Output: [0,2,3] Explanation: Notice that vertices 0, 3 and 2 are not reachable from any other node, so we must include them. Also any of these vertices can reach nodes 1 and 4.
testcases.expectedOutput: [0,2,3] Explanation: Notice that vertices 0, 3 and 2 are not reachable from any other node, so we must include them. Also any of these vertices can reach nodes 1 and 4.
